title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Don't Allow is selected
scenario: Tapping "Don't Allow" on location sharing dialogue should show permission prompt with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options when accessing Find My Device via hamburger menu, and should reappear after app restart.
steps: Select 'Find My Device (FMD)' from the menu
When the location sharing dialogue appears, tap 'Don't Allow'
Observe the permission window that appears
Check the options available in the permission window
Navigate to Find My Device (FMD) via the hamburger menu again
Observe whether the same permission prompt appears
expected: After tapping "Don't Allow", a permission window with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options should appear. After restarting the app and opening FMD again, the same permission prompt should appear again.
